title: SHINTSHA iphasiwedi
subtitle: Buyekeza ukuphepha kwe-akhawunti yakho
requirements: Kufanele iqukathe izinhlamvu ezingu-8+, osonhlamvukazi, abancane, inombolo, nezinhlamvu ezikhethekile

messages.invalid: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu eziyi-8, unofeleba oyedwa, inombolo eyodwa nohlamvu olulodwa olukhethekile.
